emails.subject: Bogdan Szopa - CV
emails.body: Vince: Can you give me some background on Bogdan? Many thanks. Shawn Forwarded by Shawn Cumberland/ENRON_DEVELOPMENT on 02/12/2001 08:12 AM Awenda2000@cs.com on 02/11/2001 11:26:12 PM

emails.subject: Re: Bogdan Szopa - CV
emails.body: Re: Bogdan Szopa CV Shawn, I have met Bogdan a few times socially. He graduated from the same university I went to in Poland. He seems to be a dynamic and a personable guy. He has experience that may be useful to your group. Vince Shawn Cumberland@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 02/12/2001 08:08 AM
